mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shop_list WHERE platform_code = #{platformCode} AND store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT * FROM shop_list WHERE (platform_code, store_id) IN
(#{k.platformCode}, #{k.storeId})
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_list SET store_id = #{storeId}, sid = #{sid}, store_name = #{storeName}, platform_code = #{platformCode}, platform_name = #{platformName}, currency = #{currency}, is_sync = #{isSync}, status = #{status}, country_code = #{countryCode} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT store_name FROM shop_list WHERE platform_code = #{platformCode} AND status = 1 AND store_name IS NOT NULL AND store_name != '' ORDER BY store_name
